title: clinopodium dentatum
intro: Clinopodium dentatum, also known as American Clinopodium, is a perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to eastern North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, to treat various health issues. Its leaves and roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it beneficial for digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. American Clinopodium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to promote digestive health, relieve headaches, and soothe sore throats.
